g.aria-label: Pass a JSON Schema with --schema and apple-fm returns data shaped to it — ready to
g.title: Pass a JSON Schema with --schema and apple-fm returns data shaped to it — ready to

g.aria-label: pipe into the rest of your tooling.

g.aria-label: "why": "A timeless tale of politics, religion, and ecology set in a distant future"
g.title: "why": "A timeless tale of politics, religion, and ecology set in a distant future"

g.text: apple-fm generate "Recommend a classic sci-fi novel." --schema novel.json
